creator: lev@FreeBSD.org
text:
On r<> 

ipfw table outIf create type iface
ipfw table outIf add iface1
ipfw table outIf add iface2
ipfw table outIf destory

causes panic on destroy with message:

Panic: Lock IPFW UH lock not exclusively locked @ /usr/src/sys/modules/ipfw/../netpfil/ipfw/ip_fw_iface.c:392
